raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "lighter_box (top)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The lighter box is clear of lateral obstructions, and there is enough overhead clearance for the arms to descend and contact the box’s left-right faces while the robot stands centered in front of the table.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the darker box, leaving the darker box exposed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table_surface_left_clear_area",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The left region of the tabletop is free of objects and large enough to accommodate a 30 cm box.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box rests stably on the left side of the table, no longer obstructing access to the darker box. Both claws release the box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker_box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is now unobstructed on all sides and can be accessed from above; sufficient lifting clearance exists above it.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is firmly grasped by both end-effectors and lifted off the table surface."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The lighter box is clear of lateral obstructions, and there is enough overhead clearance for the arms to descend and contact the box’s left-right faces while the robot stands centered in front of the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the darker box, leaving the darker box exposed.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left region of the tabletop is free of objects and large enough to accommodate a 30 cm box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box rests stably on the left side of the table, no longer obstructing access to the darker box. Both claws release the box.

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box is now unobstructed on all sides and can be accessed from above; sufficient lifting clearance exists above it.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is firmly grasped by both end-effectors and lifted off the table surface.
